definition.da_award_*_mwh: DA AS award MW from Gen_*_Qty (= Awarded_* in DA_Awards_Prices_All viewport)
definition.da_revenue_*_usd: DA AS revenue $ from DA_*_Amt (= Award_MW * DA_MCPC; UNIT FIX 2026-05-06)
definition.rt_as_imbalance_usd: RT_Ancillary_Imbalance_Amt: pooled DA→RT recleared AS settlement delta ($)
definition.as_virtual_mw: NOT computable from this dataset — Tenaska PTP does not expose RT-recleared AS MW per product
